text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I think my skin's getting a bit irritated.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My go-to skincare product was sold out so I
decided to buy an alternative... but I'm not sure
it's agreeing with me.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Then, I have just the thing! My skin's super
sensitive and I've never had any trouble with it!
It's this foreign brand...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Brilliant! I'll try that one! I'll have a crate flown
over at once!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! You could just order some online!
It'll show up in no time!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see! I'll do that, then.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hope it arrives soon! I'll just have to put up with
this dodgy complexion until then.
